en: We want you to know, brothers, about the grace of God that has been given among the churches of Macedonia,
zh: 弟兄們，我現在把 神賜給馬其頓眾教會的恩典告訴你們：

en: for in a severe test of affliction, their abundance of joy and their extreme poverty have overflowed in a wealth of generosity on their part.
zh: 他們在患難中受到極大的考驗的時候，他們滿溢的喜樂和極度的貧乏，匯流出豐厚的慷慨來。

en: For they gave according to their means, as I can testify, and beyond their means, of their own free will,
zh: 我可以作證，他們是按著能力，並且是超過了能力，自願地

en: begging us earnestly for the favor of taking part in the relief of the saints-
zh: 再三懇求我們，准許他們在供應聖徒的事上有分。

en: and this, not as we expected, but they gave themselves first to the Lord and then by the will of God to us.
zh: 他們超過了我們所期望的，照著 神的旨意，先把自己獻給主，然後獻給我們。

en: Accordingly, we urged Titus that as he had started, so he should complete among you this act of grace.
zh: 因此，我們勉勵提多，既然開始了這慈善的事，就應當在你們那裡把這事辦好。

en: But as you excel in everything- in faith, in speech, in knowledge, in all earnestness, and in our love for you- see that you excel in this act of grace also.
zh: 你們在一切事上，就如信心、口才、知識、熱情和愛我們的心，既然都是富足的，那麼，在這慈善的事上，也要顯出你們是富足的。

en: I say this not as a command, but to prove by the earnestness of others that your love also is genuine.
zh: 我這樣說，不是吩咐你們，而是藉著別人的熱心來考驗你們的愛心是否真實。

en: For you know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ, that though he was rich, yet for your sake he became poor, so that you by his poverty might become rich.
zh: 你們是知道我們的主耶穌基督的恩典的：他本來富足，卻為你們成了貧窮，要使你們因他的貧窮成為富足。

en: And in this matter I give my judgment: this benefits you, who a year ago started not only to do this work but also to desire to do it.
zh: 我在這裡表示我的意見，這對你們是有益的：你們不僅一年前就在辦這事，而且早就想這樣作了，

en: So now finish doing it as well, so that your readiness in desiring it may be matched by your completing it out of what you have.
zh: 現在就應當把這事辦好；這樣，你們既然有願意作的心，因著你們盡了自己所能的，就可以完成。

en: For if the readiness is there, it is acceptable according to what a person has, not according to what he does not have.
zh: 因為人要是有願意作的心，按照他所有的，必蒙悅納，不是按照他所沒有的。

en: I do not mean that others should be eased and you burdened, but that as a matter of fairness
zh: 這不是要別人輕省，你們受累，而是要大家都均等。

en: your abundance at the present time should supply their need, so that their abundance may supply your need, that there may be fairness.
zh: 現在你們富裕，就要補助他們的缺乏，到了他們富裕的時候，也可以補助你們的缺乏，這樣就均等了；

en: As it is written, "Whoever gathered much had nothing left over, and whoever gathered little had no lack."
zh: 正如經上所記： “多的，沒有剩餘， 少的，也不缺乏。”

en: But thanks be to God, who put into the heart of Titus the same earnest care I have for you.
zh: 感謝 神，他把我對你們那樣的熱情，放在提多的心裡。

en: For he not only accepted our appeal, but being himself very earnest he is going to you of his own accord.
zh: 提多一方面接受了勸勉，但他自己更加熱心，自願到你們那裡去。

en: With him we are sending the brother who is famous among all the churches for his preaching of the gospel.
zh: 我們還派了一位弟兄和他同去，

en: And not only that, but he has been appointed by the churches to travel with us as we carry out this act of grace that is being ministered by us, for the glory of the Lord himself and to show our good will.
zh: 免得有人因為我們經管的捐款太多，就毀謗我們。

en: We take this course so that no one should blame us about this generous gift that is being administered by us,
zh: 因為我們努力去作的，不僅是主認為是美的事，也是眾人認為是美的事。

en: for we aim at what is honorable not only in the Lord's sight but also in the sight of man.
zh: 我們還派了另一位弟兄與他們同去；我們在許多的事上多次考驗過他，知道他很熱心；現在他對你們大有信心，就更加熱心了。

en: And with them we are sending our brother whom we have often tested and found earnest in many matters, but who is now more earnest than ever because of his great confidence in you.
zh: 至於提多，他是我的同伴，為你們的緣故作了我的同工；還有我們那兩位弟兄，他們是眾教會所派的，是基督的榮耀。

en: As for Titus, he is my partner and fellow worker for your benefit. And as for our brothers, they are messengers of the churches, the glory of Christ.
zh: 所以，你們要在眾教會面前，向他們證明你們的愛心和我們所誇耀你們的。

en: So give proof before the churches of your love and of our boasting about you to these men.
